allow:
Bash(git commit -m "fix: Add NodeDetailsResponse interface for graph detail panel

Define comprehensive NodeDetailsResponse interface to properly type
the node details API response. This fixes TypeScript compilation error:
''Property summary does not exist on type {}''

- Add NodeDetailsResponse interface with all response fields
- Type the useQuery with NodeDetailsResponse generic
- Cast apiClient.get response to NodeDetailsResponse
- Includes types for objectsGranted, fieldsGranted, summary, etc.

Fixes TypeScript compilation error in Railway build.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: Add collapsible sidebar that expands on hover

Implement space-saving sidebar that shows only icons when collapsed
and expands to show full menu on hover. This provides more screen
real estate for the main content area.

Features:
- Collapses to 64px width (16 tailwind units)
- Expands to 256px width (64 tailwind units) on hover
- Smooth transitions with 300ms duration
- Shows hamburger icon when collapsed, logo when expanded
- Tooltips appear on hover for collapsed menu items
- Icons remain visible in both states
- Navigation labels only show when expanded
- Footer only visible when expanded

UX Improvements:
- More screen space for content
- Smooth animations
- Clear visual feedback
- Maintains full functionality in both states

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement full record-level access analysis

Complete implementation of record-level access feature showing
all 6 ways users can access records in Salesforce:

Backend Changes:
- Add database models for sharing data (AccountShare, OpportunityShare,
  Groups, GroupMembers, AccountTeamMembers)
- Create Alembic migration for new sharing tables
- Add Salesforce client extraction methods for sharing data
- Implement RecordAccessService with comprehensive access calculations:
  * Owned records calculation
  * Role hierarchy traversal (recursive subordinate roles)
  * Manual shares lookup (direct + group membership)
  * Team access (Account/Opportunity/Case teams)
  * Sharing rule evaluation
- Update SnapshotPersister to handle sharing data
- Replace placeholder record-access endpoint with real implementation

Frontend Changes:
- Completely redesign RecordAccessInfo component
- Add summary cards with gradient backgrounds for quick overview
- Display owned records breakdown by object type
- Show role hierarchy with subordinate roles listing
- Table view for manual shares with access levels
- Card-based team access display
- Table view for sharing rules
- Smooth transitions and hover effects
- Empty state messaging for each access type

Features:
- Real-time role hierarchy calculation
- Group membership resolution (including nested groups)
- Manual share detection across objects
- Team membership analysis
- Sharing rule grant identification
- Comprehensive access summary statistics

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add smooth transitions and animations throughout UI

Enhance user experience with polished animations and transitions:

Card Component:
- Add hover effects with shadow transitions
- Scale animation on elevated cards (1.01 scale)
- Border color transitions on hover
- 200ms duration for smooth feel

Badge Component:
- Add hover scale effect (1.05 scale)
- Background color transitions on hover
- 150ms duration for snappy feedback
- Improved visual hierarchy

Button Component:
- Add active press animation (0.95 scale)
- Shadow effects on hover with variant-specific colors
- Improved transition from ''colors'' to ''all'' for comprehensive effects
- 200ms duration for polished interactions

Overall Improvements:
- Consistent transition timings across components
- Subtle animations that don''t distract
- Enhanced visual feedback for user interactions
- Better perceived performance
- Professional, modern feel

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
